title: ecbolium androsaemifolium
intro: Ecbolium androsaemifolium, also known as the flowering ecbolium, is a tropical plant species native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, characterized by its hairy, ovate leaves and showy, yellow flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of ecbolium androsaemifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against bacterial and viral infections. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions and infusions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
